ddls:
CREATE TABLE "disease_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease report */,
  "ticks" INTEGER /* Timestamp for the report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the report is associated with */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "susceptible" INTEGER /* Number of susceptible individuals */,
  "cum_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative cases reported */,
  "cum_infected" INTEGER /* Cumulative infections reported */,
  "cum_recovered" INTEGER /* Cumulative recoveries reported */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* New cases reported since the last update */,
  "new_infected" INTEGER /* New infections reported since the last update */,
  "new_recovered" INTEGER /* New recoveries reported since the last update */,
  "new_tests" INTEGER /* New tests conducted since the last update */,
  "alert_level" INTEGER /* Alert level indicating severity (1-5) */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time of the report */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_reports_alert_level FOREIGN KEY ("alert_level") REFERENCES alert_levels ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Country, State) */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for health officials in the region */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical boundary coordinates of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_levels" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert level */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Numerical level of alert (1-5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert level */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold values that trigger the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_statistics" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where tests were conducted */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of tests that returned positive results */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the tests were conducted */,
  "test_time" TEXT /* Time when the tests were conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of tests conducted (e.g., PCR, Rapid) */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory where tests were conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recovery_statistics" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where recoveries were reported */,
  "total_recoveries" INTEGER /* Total number of recoveries */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the recoveries were reported */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Rate of recovery for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., report, testing statistics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_types" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease type */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease (e.g., Influenza, COVID-19) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease type */,
  "incubation_period" INTEGER /* Average incubation period of the disease */,
  "transmission_method" TEXT /* Mode of transmission of the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_statistics" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case record */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease associated with the cases */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where cases were reported */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date when the cases were reported */,
  "case_time" TEXT /* Time when the cases were reported */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the cases (e.g., 0-19, 20-39) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the cases (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_statistics_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreak_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert record */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease triggering the alert */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region affected by the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_level" INTEGER /* Level of the alert (e.g., High, Moderate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_alerts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_alerts_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_statistics" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where vaccinations were administered */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccinations were administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the demographic data applies */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., 0-19, 20-39) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the population (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health facility */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the facility is located */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the health facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of health facility (e.g., Hospital, Clinic) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the health facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_facilities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient record */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case record associated with the patient */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the patient is infected with */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the patient is located */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms exhibited by the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES case_statistics ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES disease_types ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
